differential_diagnoses: Obstructive Sleep Apnea with Obesity Hypoventilation Syndrome
next_steps: Perform serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chains
Obtain repetitive nerve stimulation and electromyography
Send serum for acetylcholine receptor and MuSK antibody testing
Perform cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement
Perform a formal videofluoroscopic swallowing study
Consult neurology, cardiology, and pulmonology for co-management
